instructions: नीचे दिए गए Hindi sentences को English में translate करें। Let's / Let us / Let's not — सही form पहचानें और translate करें।

questions.hindi: चलो शुरू करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Let's begin' is a simple suggestion using Let's + base verb.

questions.hindi: चलो बाज़ार चलते हैं।
alternatives: Let us go to the market.
questions.explanation: 'Let's go to the market' — let's followed by base verb 'go'.

questions.hindi: चलो एक फ़िल्म देखते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Watch a movie' is the correct phrase, not 'see a movie' in standard usage.

questions.hindi: चलो साथ में खाना खाते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Have lunch' is natural. 'Eat together' is also correct.

questions.hindi: चलो मीटिंग शुरू करते हैं।
questions.explanation: Standard office phrase. 'Let's start the meeting' is very common in professional English.

questions.hindi: चलो समय बर्बाद मत करते हैं।
questions.explanation: Negative form: Let's not + base verb. 'Let's don't waste' is WRONG.

questions.hindi: आइए एक बेहतर कल बनाएं।
questions.english: Let us build a better tomorrow.
questions.explanation: 'Let us' is the formal version. Common in speeches and formal writing.

questions.hindi: चलो अगले point पर चलते हैं।
questions.english: Let's move on to the next point.
alternatives: Let us proceed to the next point.
questions.explanation: Very common in meetings and presentations.

questions.hindi: चलो अभी कोई फैसला मत लेते हैं।
questions.english: Let's not make any decision right now.
questions.explanation: 'Let's not make a decision' or 'Let's not decide' — both are correct.

questions.hindi: चलो data देखते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Look at the data' is standard business English.

questions.hindi: चलो एक deadline तय करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Set a deadline' is the standard collocation in English.

questions.hindi: चलो इस बारे में बहस मत करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us not argue about this.
questions.explanation: 'Argue about something' is the correct preposition.

questions.hindi: आइए इस विषय पर विचार करें।
alternatives: Let us think about this matter.
questions.explanation: 'Let us consider' is formal. Used in meetings, official discussions.

questions.hindi: चलो project की planning करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Plan the project' is direct and clear. Professional usage.

questions.hindi: चलो थोड़ा आराम करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Take a break' is the standard phrase.

questions.hindi: चलो client को जल्दी reply करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's reply to the client soon.
alternatives: Let's respond to the client quickly.
Let us reply to the client soon.
questions.explanation: 'Reply to' not 'reply' alone. Always include 'to' with reply.

questions.hindi: चलो एक दूसरे से सीखते हैं।
alternatives: Let us learn from one another.
questions.explanation: 'Learn from each other' expresses mutual learning.

questions.hindi: चलो उसे परेशान मत करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Disturb' or 'bother' both work here.

questions.hindi: चलो मिलकर plan करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Plan together' = collaborative planning. Simple and clear.

questions.hindi: आइए हम सब मिलकर इस चुनौती का सामना करें।
questions.english: Let us all face this challenge together.
alternatives: Let's all face this challenge together.
questions.hint: Formal: Let us all + base verb
questions.explanation: 'Let us all' adds emphasis — all people included. Formal tone.

questions.hindi: चलो कल सुबह जल्दी उठते हैं।
questions.english: Let's wake up early tomorrow morning.
alternatives: Let us wake up early tomorrow.
Let's get up early tomorrow morning.
questions.explanation: 'Wake up early' is the correct phrasal verb.

questions.hindi: चलो अपनी गलतियों से सीखते हैं।
alternatives: Let us learn from our mistakes.
questions.explanation: Very common motivational phrase in English.

questions.hindi: चलो project deadline से पहले काम खत्म करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's finish the work before the project deadline.
alternatives: Let's complete the work before the deadline.
questions.explanation: 'Finish work before the deadline' is a professional phrase.

questions.hindi: चलो इस मौके को जाने मत देते हैं।
alternatives: Let us not miss this opportunity.
Let's not let this opportunity go.
questions.explanation: 'Miss an opportunity' = fail to take advantage of it.

questions.hindi: चलो एक नई शुरुआत करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us make a new beginning.
questions.explanation: 'Make a fresh start' is an idiomatic expression.

questions.hindi: चलो सच बोलते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Speak the truth' is more formal; 'be honest' is more informal.

questions.hindi: चलो कल conference call करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's have a conference call tomorrow.
alternatives: Let's schedule a conference call for tomorrow.
questions.explanation: 'Have a conference call' is standard business English.

questions.hindi: चलो product launch की तैयारी करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's prepare for the product launch.
alternatives: Let us prepare for the product launch.
questions.explanation: 'Prepare for' = get ready for an event.

questions.hindi: चलो इस समस्या को जड़ से सुलझाते हैं।
questions.english: Let's resolve this problem from the root.
alternatives: Let's solve this problem at the root.
questions.explanation: 'Root cause' is the fundamental reason. Advanced professional phrase.

questions.hindi: आइए अपने देश को आगे ले जाएं।
questions.english: Let us take our country forward.
alternatives: Let us build our nation together.
questions.explanation: Formal, patriotic speech-style usage of 'Let us'.

questions.hindi: चलो इसे ignore मत करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Ignore' or 'overlook' both work. 'Overlook' is slightly softer.

questions.hindi: चलो अपने goals review करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Review goals' is common at the start of a new period (week/month/year).

questions.hindi: चलो एक दूसरे की मदद करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Help each other' or 'help one another' — both are correct.

questions.hindi: चलो positive सोचते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Think positively' (adverb) or 'be positive' — both natural.

questions.hindi: चलो नए ideas brainstorm करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us brainstorm some new ideas.
questions.explanation: 'Brainstorm ideas' — very common in creative and office settings.

questions.hindi: चलो इस project को time पर deliver करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's deliver this project on time.
alternatives: Let us deliver the project on time.
Let's complete this project on time.
questions.explanation: 'Deliver on time' is a key professional commitment.

questions.hindi: चलो रात को जल्दी सो जाते हैं।
alternatives: Let's go to bed early tonight.
questions.explanation: 'Sleep early' or 'go to bed early' — both are natural.

questions.hindi: चलो किसी की बुराई मत करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's not speak ill of anyone.
alternatives: Let's not talk badly about anyone.
questions.explanation: 'Speak ill of someone' is an idiomatic expression meaning to say bad things.

questions.hindi: आइए सब मिलकर अपना योगदान दें।
questions.english: Let us all contribute our part.
alternatives: Let us each do our part.
questions.explanation: Formal, inclusive language. 'Let us all' = everyone together.

questions.hindi: चलो office में meeting room book करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's book a meeting room at the office.
alternatives: Let us book the conference room.
questions.explanation: 'Book a room' = reserve a room. Common office task.

questions.hindi: चलो customer को call करके update दें।
questions.english: Let's call the customer and give them an update.
alternatives: Let's update the customer with a call.
questions.explanation: Compound action — call and update. Both connected with 'and'.

questions.hindi: चलो रोज़ exercise करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Exercise every day' is a healthy suggestion.

questions.hindi: चलो बिना सोचे कोई comment मत करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Comment without thinking' = react impulsively. Good life lesson.

questions.hindi: चलो weekend पर trip plan करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's plan a trip for the weekend.
alternatives: Let us plan a weekend trip.
questions.explanation: 'Plan a trip' is a common suggestion for leisure time.

questions.hindi: चलो team को motivate करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Motivate the team' — essential leadership phrase.

questions.hindi: चलो ईमानदार रहते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Let's be honest' — Let's + be + adjective is a common pattern.

questions.hindi: चलो किसी पर भरोसा करने से पहले जाँच करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Verify before trusting' — professional and personal wisdom.

questions.hindi: आइए इस बैठक को सार्थक बनाएं।
questions.english: Let us make this meeting meaningful.
questions.explanation: Formal suggestion to make a meeting valuable.

questions.hindi: चलो अपनी गलती स्वीकार करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Accept' or 'acknowledge a mistake' — both professional.

questions.hindi: चलो यह प्रेज़ेंटेशन समाप्त करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Wrap up' = finish/conclude. Very common in presentation closing.

questions.hindi: चलो इसे जल्दबाज़ी में मत करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us not rush into this.
questions.explanation: 'Rush into' = do hastily. 'Don't rush' and 'Let's not rush' mean the same.

questions.hindi: चलो नए market में अपना product launch करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's launch our product in the new market.
alternatives: Let us introduce our product to the new market.
questions.explanation: 'Launch a product in a market' is standard business phrasing.

questions.hindi: चलो office party organize करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us organize a team party.
questions.explanation: 'Organize a party' = plan and arrange all details.

questions.hindi: चलो बेकार की बातों पर ध्यान मत देते हैं।
questions.english: Let's not pay attention to unnecessary things.
alternatives: Let's not focus on irrelevant matters.
Let us not bother with useless things.
questions.explanation: 'Pay attention to' = focus on. Negative: 'Let's not pay attention to.'

questions.hindi: चलो यह challenge accept करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us take on this challenge.
questions.explanation: 'Accept a challenge' = agree to face a difficult task.

questions.hindi: आइए एक नई शुरुआत करें।
questions.english: Let us make a new beginning.
questions.hint: Formal: Let us + make + new beginning
questions.explanation: Formal, motivational language. Common in speeches and addresses.

questions.hindi: चलो feedback लेते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Gather feedback' is professional. 'Collect feedback' also works.

questions.hindi: चलो अपनी team को train करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Train the team' = provide professional development.

questions.hindi: चलो इस issue को ignore मत करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us not overlook this issue.
questions.explanation: 'Ignore an issue' = fail to deal with it. Important professional phrase.

questions.hindi: चलो साथ में celebration करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Celebrate together' — inclusive celebration with everyone.

questions.hindi: चलो एक team meeting schedule करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us set up a team meeting.
questions.explanation: 'Schedule a meeting' = fix a date and time for it.

questions.hindi: चलो हर रात English की practice करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us practice English every evening.
questions.explanation: Forming a good habit using Let's suggestion.

questions.hindi: चलो कुछ नया सीखने की कोशिश करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's try to learn something new.
alternatives: Let us attempt to learn something new.
questions.explanation: 'Try to' = attempt. Combined with 'Let's' to form a suggestion.

questions.hindi: चलो अपना best देते हैं।
alternatives: Let us give our best effort.
questions.explanation: 'Give our best' = make maximum effort. Motivational phrase.

questions.hindi: चलो गलतफहमी दूर करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Clear up a misunderstanding' = explain and fix a confusion.

questions.hindi: चलो बात करते हैं।
questions.explanation: Simple, direct suggestion. 'Let's talk' is very common in English.

questions.hindi: चलो आज रात पर पार्टी करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Have a party' or 'throw a party' — both are natural.

questions.hindi: चलो देर रात तक मत जागते हैं।
questions.english: Let's not stay up late at night.
alternatives: Let's not be up too late.
Let us not stay awake late.
questions.explanation: 'Stay up late' = remain awake past normal bedtime.

questions.hindi: आइए एक बेहतर दुनिया बनाएं।
questions.english: Let us create a better world.
alternatives: Let us build a better world.
questions.explanation: Formal, inspirational. Used in speeches, essays, formal writings.

questions.hindi: चलो अपने targets achieve करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Achieve targets/goals' is essential professional vocabulary.

questions.hindi: चलो एक साथ lunch करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Have lunch together' = eat the midday meal as a group.

questions.hindi: चलो budget पर फैसला करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Decide on' = make a final choice about something.

questions.hindi: चलो हर meeting में notes लेते हैं।
questions.english: Let's take notes in every meeting.
alternatives: Let us make notes during every meeting.
questions.explanation: 'Take notes' = write down important points.

questions.hindi: चलो इस बात को यहीं खत्म करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us close this topic here.
questions.explanation: 'End a discussion here' — used to close an ongoing debate.

questions.hindi: चलो पहले plan बनाते हैं, फिर काम शुरू करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's first make a plan and then start working.
alternatives: Let us plan first before we begin.
questions.hint: Let's + make a plan + and then + start
questions.explanation: Two actions joined with 'and then'. Planning before execution.

questions.hindi: चलो इस budget पर सवाल उठाते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Question the budget' = scrutinize it critically.

questions.hindi: चलो एक दूसरे को inspire करते हैं।
questions.explanation: Mutual inspiration — 'inspire each other' or 'inspire one another'.

questions.hindi: चलो सुबह की शुरुआत positive note से करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's start the morning on a positive note.
alternatives: Let us begin the day positively.
questions.hint: Let's + start + on a positive note
questions.explanation: 'Start on a positive note' is an idiom meaning to begin well.

questions.hindi: चलो अपनी team के साथ transparent रहते हैं।
questions.english: Let's be transparent with our team.
alternatives: Let us remain transparent with the team.
questions.explanation: 'Be transparent with someone' = be open and honest.

questions.hindi: चलो किसी commitment को तोड़ते नहीं हैं।
alternatives: Let us not go back on our commitments.
questions.explanation: 'Break a commitment/promise' = fail to keep it.

questions.hindi: चलो सभी stakeholders को update देते हैं।
alternatives: Let us inform all the stakeholders.
questions.explanation: 'Update stakeholders' is essential in project management.

questions.hindi: चलो एक sustainable solution खोजते हैं।
alternatives: Let us look for a sustainable solution.
questions.explanation: 'Sustainable solution' = long-term, eco-friendly answer.

questions.hindi: आइए एकता में विश्वास रखें।
alternatives: Let us stand together in unity.
questions.explanation: Formal and motivational. Common in official speeches.

questions.hindi: चलो किसी की बात बीच में मत काटते हैं।
alternatives: Let us not cut someone off while they speak.
questions.explanation: 'Interrupt someone' = speak while they are talking. Rude in professional settings.

questions.hindi: चलो company की policy follow करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us adhere to the company policy.
questions.explanation: 'Follow policy' or 'adhere to policy' — both are professional.

questions.hindi: चलो तनाव कम करने के लिए yoga करते हैं।
questions.english: Let's do yoga to reduce stress.
alternatives: Let us practice yoga to lower stress.
questions.explanation: Purpose clause: 'to reduce stress'. Combined suggestion.

questions.hindi: चलो एक inclusive workplace बनाते हैं।
alternatives: Let us create an inclusive work environment.
questions.explanation: 'Inclusive workplace' = where everyone feels welcome. DEI term.

questions.hindi: चलो अभी decide मत करते हैं — सोचते हैं।
questions.english: Let's not decide now — let's think about it.
alternatives: Let us not rush; let us think first.
questions.explanation: Two-part sentence. First negative, then positive suggestion.
questions.grammarRule: Let's not + base verb; Let's + base verb

questions.hindi: चलो एक realistic plan बनाते हैं।
alternatives: Let us create a practical and achievable plan.
questions.explanation: 'Realistic plan' = achievable and sensible plan.

questions.hindi: चलो इस अवसर का फायदा उठाते हैं।
questions.english: Let's take advantage of this opportunity.
alternatives: Let us make the most of this opportunity.
questions.explanation: 'Take advantage of an opportunity' = use it wisely.

questions.hindi: चलो अपने budget में रहते हैं।
alternatives: Let us keep to the budget.
questions.explanation: 'Stay within budget' = not exceed the allocated money.

questions.hindi: चलो customer की बात ध्यान से सुनते हैं।
questions.english: Let's listen carefully to the customer.
alternatives: Let us hear the customer out.
questions.explanation: 'Listen carefully' = give full attention. Important customer service skill.

questions.hindi: आइए अपने nation के विकास में योगदान दें।
questions.english: Let us contribute to the development of our nation.
alternatives: Let us play our part in building the nation.
questions.explanation: Highly formal. Used in speeches, national day addresses.

questions.hindi: चलो problem को negative तरीके से मत देखते हैं।
questions.english: Let's not view the problem negatively.
alternatives: Let's not look at this as a problem.
Let us not approach this with a negative mindset.
questions.explanation: 'View negatively' = see in a bad light. Mindset change phrase.

questions.hindi: चलो feedback के आधार पर improve करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us grow based on the feedback we receive.
questions.explanation: 'Improve based on feedback' = use feedback to get better.

questions.hindi: चलो रोज़ एक नया English word सीखते हैं।
questions.english: Let's learn one new English word every day.
alternatives: Let us pick one English word to learn daily.
questions.hint: Let's + learn + one word + every day
questions.explanation: Great language learning suggestion. Daily habit building.

questions.hindi: चलो transparency और accountability maintain करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us ensure transparency and accountability.
questions.explanation: Compound objects: 'transparency and accountability'. Professional values.

questions.hindi: चलो एक दूसरे का सम्मान करते हैं।
alternatives: Let us show respect to one another.
questions.explanation: 'Respect each other' = treat each other with dignity.

questions.hindi: चलो इस success को celebrate करते हैं।
questions.explanation: 'Celebrate success' — motivating closure to a completed goal.

questions.hindi: चलो एक proactive approach अपनाते हैं।
alternatives: Let us take a proactive approach.
questions.explanation: 'Adopt a proactive approach' — top interview and professional phrase.
